purpose_context: The 2026-06-03 harness audit identified stale documentation pointing users to retired Codex install paths, pre-existing snapshot failures in the command renderer test suite, and unverified install-surface claims for Antigravity and Kiro. This mission resolves all four gaps with verified documentation, passing tests, and explicit scope boundaries so the 3.3.x plugin-install work (tracked in #1635) can proceed on a clean foundation.
purpose_tldr: Close four agent harness-install gaps found in the 2026-06-03 audit: stale Codex docs, snapshot drift, and unverified Antigravity/Kiro install surfaces.
source_description: GitHub issue #1649: Epic: Agent plugin and harness install verification follow-through
